name: input
title: Input
description: A single-line text input. Supports all native input types.
a11y: Always associate with a <label> via htmlFor / id.
Use aria-describedby to link helper text or error messages.
aria-invalid="true" when the field has a validation error.

do: Use placeholder only as a hint, not as a label substitute.
dont: Don't rely on placeholder text to convey required information.
